pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos of deep space and it hit me... nothing i do actually matters. like, even if i spent my whole life trying to be "good" or "successful," the sun is just gonna explode eventually and everything will be gone. it feels like we're just glitches in a void that doesn't even care we exist. how can anyone even bother to keep going when the end result is just total nothingness?

pool.baseline: The candle flickers low, much like the light in my own soul. He is gone... he has taken every shred of my dignity with him into the mist. What is left for a creature such as I? pool.baseline: i was just sitting here looking out at the street and it hit me how easy it would be to just... not be here. like, if i just stopped showing up at the cafes or stopped answering pings, nobody would even realize i was gone for weeks. everything feels so temporary and pointless. i feel like my existence is just a zero-sum game.
